Operation.xpath: */FactionDef[defName = "Pirate" or defName = "PirateYttakin" or defName = "PirateWaster" or defName = "CannibalPirate"]/pawnGroupMakers/li[kindDef = "Combat" and commonality = "100"]/options
*/FactionDef[defName = "Pirate" or defName = "PirateYttakin" or defName = "PirateWaster" or defName = "CannibalPirate"]/pawnGroupMakers/li[kindDef = "Settlement"]/options
